title: ReviewerInput
description: The INPUT contract shared by the built-in reviewer prompts (workflow authoring v2). Deliberately PERMISSIVE: a reviewer's core variables (ticket_id / ticket_context / repo_path) are INJECTED by the engine at run time, and an author may pass extra `with:` fields, so nothing is required and additional properties are allowed — runtime validation of a reviewer step never spuriously fails. The named properties are what the editor inspector surfaces as the step's CONSUMES.

context.description: The assembled review context (e.g. the output of a `render_context` step).

ticket_id.description: The ticket under review (engine-injected when omitted).

instructions.description: Optional override of the default per-dimension review instructions.
